title: aegiceras corniculatum
intro: Aegiceras corniculatum, also known as Sea Lavender or Saltwort, is a type of halophyte shrub found in coastal areas, characterized by its small, white flowers and leaves that can tolerate high salt concentrations. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Aegiceras corniculatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Aegiceras corniculatum can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, as well as a topical poultice, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
